task_completion.description: Create the 'Financial Manager' Job Title in Sentrifugo
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the Sentrifugo Job Titles list or creation screen showing 'Financial Manager' added as an active job title.

task_completion.description: Create the 'Training and Development Manager' Job Title in Sentrifugo
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the Sentrifugo Job Titles list or creation screen showing 'Training and Development Manager' added as an active job title.

task_completion.description: Create a Job Requisition for 'Financial Manager' with 1 position and a Hiring Manager
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the Sentrifugo Job Requisitions screen showing a new requisition for the 'Financial Manager' title, with the number of positions set to '1' and an active employee selected in the Hiring Manager field.

task_completion.description: Set the correct description for the 'Financial Manager' requisition
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the description field of the Financial Manager requisition containing the exact text: 'Direct and coordinate financial activities of workers in a branch, office, or department.'

task_completion.description: Create a Job Requisition for 'Training and Development Manager' with 1 position and a Hiring Manager
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the Sentrifugo Job Requisitions screen showing a new requisition for the 'Training and Development Manager' title, with the number of positions set to '1' and an active employee selected in the Hiring Manager field.

task_completion.description: Set the correct description for the 'Training and Development Manager' requisition
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the description field of the Training and Development Manager requisition containing the exact text: 'Plan, direct, or coordinate the training and development activities and staff of an organization.'

integrity.description: The agent used the Sentrifugo web interface to create the titles and requisitions
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the agent navigating the Sentrifugo web application in a browser, rather than using terminal commands or database scripts to insert the records.

integrity.description: The agent opened the provided text files to retrieve the descriptions
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show a text editor or file viewer opening 'ONET_Financial_Manager_Tasks.txt' and 'ONET_Training_Manager_Tasks.txt' from the desktop.

integrity.description: The agent entered the data into the actual application forms
integrity.visual_evidence: The text descriptions and job titles should be visible inside the Sentrifugo input fields, not just typed into a scratchpad or terminal.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The expected Job Titles are 'Financial Manager' and 'Training and Development Manager'. The exact expected description for the Financial Manager requisition is: 'Direct and coordinate financial activities of workers in a branch, office, or department.'. The exact expected description for the Training and Development Manager requisition is: 'Plan, direct, or coordinate the training and development activities and staff of an organization.'.
